category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Chocolate Doom as an accurate source port of Doom.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is chocolate-doom; source_facts.homepage uses the official Chocolate Doom project identity.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Chocolate Doom site; its official wiki is the project documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains an upstream repository value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Doom source-port functionality; source_facts.executables lists Doom, Heretic, Hexen, Strife, and server binaries.
